overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval village with timber-framed houses and stone fortifications. The character moves from a grassy courtyard through cobblestone streets and past villagers, guards, and children in a sunlit historic setting.

events.description: passes through wooden village gate from grassy courtyard onto cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily through a grassy courtyard toward a wooden gate, passing villagers near the fence

notable_agents.action: woman kneeling and washing clothes in a wooden tub
child standing near the wooden fence

entered.detail: prominent dark timber-framed building with steep roof in the background
tall cylindrical red-brick tower rising behind the village
rustic wooden fence lining the courtyard perimeter
wooden gate structure marking the entrance to the village street
cobblestone path leading into the village center

segments.scene_description: Geralt begins in a grassy courtyard enclosed by wooden fences, with a large timber tavern and tall brick tower visible in the background. He walks toward and passes through a wooden village gate, transitioning onto a cobblestone street while passing a woman washing clothes and a child near the fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded cobblestone street with outdoor seating

events.description: enters heavily shaded area covered by trees, significantly dimming the scene
approaches and enters a stone archway passage covered in vines

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the cobblestone street passing villagers seated at outdoor tables, then enters a shaded tree-covered passage

notable_agents.action: group of men sitting at a wooden table drinking and conversing
woman in a dress walking along the street

entered.detail: wooden tables and benches where villagers are gathered
stone passage covered in vines and foliage creating a tunnel effect
tree-covered path with dense birch trees on both sides

segments.scene_description: Walking along the cobblestone street, Geralt passes villagers seated at outdoor tables on the left. The environment becomes increasingly shaded by dense trees, transitioning into a narrow stone archway passage covered in vines. The lighting shifts from bright sunlight to dappled shade as he approaches the archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: village square with thatched hut and outdoor dining

events.description: exits the shaded archway into bright sunlight of the village square
emerges from stone passage into open village square with a thatched roof hut

agents.ego_description: Geralt emerges into a sunlit village square, walking past villagers dining at tables and continuing toward residential streets

notable_agents.action: villagers sitting at wooden picnic tables eating and drinking

entered.detail: small building with straw thatched roof in the village square
grassy open area in the center of the village
wooden tables with villagers seated around them
cylindrical stone tower with conical roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the shaded stone archway into bright sunlight, Geralt enters a village square featuring a thatched roof hut and villagers dining at outdoor tables. The scene opens up significantly with full sky visibility before transitioning back to cobblestone streets lined with timber houses.

events.description: dog runs across the cobblestone street from left to right
reaches the large stone fortification wall and castle gate area

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through residential cobblestone streets, passing playing children and a dog, approaching a large stone castle wall

notable_agents.action: dog walking along the cobblestone street

entered.detail: massive stone castle wall with weathered bricks and ivy
fortified gate structure with guards standing watch
wooden structure near the gate where guards are stationed

segments.scene_description: Walking along residential cobblestone streets, Geralt passes children playing and a dog wandering the road. The timber houses give way to a massive stone fortification wall on the left, with a castle gatehouse visible ahead. Guards in armor become visible near the gate structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street alongside castle wall with guards

events.description: passes guards in red armor standing watch along the stone wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the narrow street beside the stone fortification, passing guards in red armor and villagers

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor with helmet standing guard near the wall
villager in yellow cap walking toward the camera

entered.detail: wooden construction scaffolding attached to the stone wall
elevated wooden bridge connecting buildings over the street
narrow winding street between the stone wall and timber buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking along the narrow cobblestone street beside the massive stone fortification wall, Geralt passes guards in distinctive red armor standing watch. Wooden scaffolding and an elevated walkway bridge appear overhead as the street narrows between the castle wall and timber-framed buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic medieval village that gradually transitions from open grassy courtyards to the imposing stone fortifications of a castle. It begins in a grassy courtyard enclosed by wooden fences, moving past a timber tavern and brick tower before passing through a village gate onto a cobblestone street. As the camera follows Geralt, the bright sunlight shifts into dappled shade beneath dense trees and a vine-covered stone archway, which then opens back into a sunlit village square filled with thatched huts and dining villagers. The scene then expands along residential streets lined with timber houses and playing children before the terrain narrows against a massive stone fortification wall. Finally, the path leads past guards in red armor and beneath wooden scaffolding and an elevated walkway bridge as the camera approaches the castle gatehouse.
